name: bring up core
prompt: Bring up the vendored Open5GS compose stack for the Skillful RAN proof-of-concept lane.

name: core status
prompt: Check the status of the pinned Open5GS core stack before starting the ZMQ lane.

name: core down
prompt: Tear down the repo-owned Open5GS core containers and remove orphans.

name: dry run compose
prompt: Show me the docker compose commands for the vendored Open5GS core without executing them.

name: negative local lane
prompt: Run the local split CU DU no-core test-mode lane.

name: negative zmq e2e
prompt: Run the full gNB plus Open5GS plus srsUE ZMQ proof-of-concept path.

name: negative packaging
prompt: Promote reusable notes into a tracked skill.
